book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to include internet and should have a star of 4
The hotel should include free parking and should be in the type of guesthouse
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 6 people and 3 nights starting from saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the cheap price range and should serve modern european food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 14:00 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
